summary: This Standard Operating Procedure defines the protocol for annual Management Reviews of the company's Quality Management System (QMS). It outlines required inputs like audit results and KPIs, as well as outputs regarding strategic goals and resource allocation to ensure ISO 13485:2016 compliance. The document includes empty placeholders for specific management personnel names and signature tables.
